landing.headline: Heat is rising. Local crews can't work through it. Abadii connects you with labour that can.
landing.sub: Abadii matches employers in heatwave-affected regions with verified, heat-acclimated workers ready to relocate and work — with sponsorship support built in.
landing.statHeat: Peak summer surface temperatures in the Gulf now regularly pass 50°C — well past safe local labour thresholds.
landing.step1Body: Trade, years of outdoor heat experience, languages, certifications, and a short video introduction.
landing.step2Body: Search by trade, experience, availability and heat-work history. Shortlist candidates in one tap.
landing.step3Body: Message directly, schedule interviews, and track visa and sponsorship paperwork in one place.
landing.trustTitle: Built on trust, not just listings
landing.trustBody: Every worker completes heat-safety training and ID verification before appearing in search. Every employer is license-verified before they can unlock contact details.
landing.footerCta: Ready to build your heat-ready crew?

worker.onboardingSub: This is what employers will see. Be specific — detail builds trust.

employer.noResults: No workers match these filters yet.
employer.planFree: Free plan — limited profile views this month
